_meta.description: Reusable template for creating new industry pages. Duplicate this file, rename to <slug>.json, and replace all {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens.

placeholders.{{SLUG}}: URL slug (kebab-case, matches folder). e.g. edtech-software-development, fintech-software-development
placeholders.{{INDUSTRY}}: Full industry display name. e.g. EdTech, Fintech, Healthcare, Logistics
placeholders.{{INDUSTRY_PRODUCT}}: Main product noun for this industry. e.g. LMS & E-Learning Platforms, Banking & Payment Apps, Telemedicine Apps
placeholders.{{INDUSTRY_KEYWORD}}: Core gradient keyword in hero headline. e.g. EdTech Platform, Fintech App, Healthcare Platform
placeholders.{{META_DESCRIPTION}}: 150-160 char SEO description with primary keyword + outcome
placeholders.{{HERO_BADGE_TEXT}}: Short trust statement above headline. e.g. 'Trusted by 120+ companies across 20 countries'
placeholders.{{HERO_OUTCOME}}: Headline suffix conveying outcome + timeline. e.g. 'Launch in 10-20 Weeks'
placeholders.{{HERO_SUBHEADLINE}}: 1-2 sentences expanding on what you build + who it's for
placeholders.{{FAQ_ITEMS}}: Industry-specific FAQs (6 recommended) — pricing, timeline, integrations, web/mobile, compliance, scalability
placeholders.{{COMPLIANCE_STANDARDS}}: Industry regulations. e.g. 'COPPA, FERPA & GDPR' for EdTech; 'HIPAA, HL7 & GDPR' for Healthcare; 'PCI DSS, SOC 2 & GDPR' for Fintech

faqPage._note: Auto-generate from content.sections[type=faq].items — one {@type:Question,name,acceptedAnswer} per FAQ

address.streetAddress: 503, Fortune Business Hub, Science City Road, Sola

howTo.name: How to Get Started with {{INDUSTRY}} Development

sections.title: Our {{INDUSTRY}} Development Solutions
sections.subtitle: End-to-end {{INDUSTRY}} solutions — from {{INDUSTRY_PRODUCT}} to AI-driven systems.

items.title: Custom {{INDUSTRY}} Platform Development
items.description: Have a unique {{INDUSTRY}} idea? We build tailored solutions from MVP to enterprise. Your vision, our engineering — MVP in 10-20 weeks.

sections.title: Ready to Build an {{INDUSTRY}} App?
sections.subtitle: Get a free consultation and project estimate. We respond within 24 hours.

sections.title: Technologies We Use
sections.subtitle: Modern, battle-tested stack chosen for scalability, performance, and developer velocity.

items.title: {{INDUSTRY}} Domain Expertise
items.description: 15+ {{INDUSTRY}} platforms built. We understand user journeys, industry workflows, and compliance ({{COMPLIANCE_STANDARDS}}).

items.title: Scalable Architecture
items.description: Cloud-native, microservices-based architecture designed for large user volumes. Auto-scaling from 100 to 1M+ users.

items.title: Data-Driven Design
items.description: Built-in analytics dashboards, user behavior tracking, and engagement metrics. Data-informed decisions from day one.

items.title: User-First Approach
items.description: UX research with real users. High adoption rates because we design for how people actually work.

items.title: Ongoing Support
items.description: Post-launch maintenance, performance optimization, and feature iterations. Your platform grows with your user base.

sections.title: What {{INDUSTRY}} Founders Say
sections._note: Replace placeholder testimonials with real client quotes before publishing.

sections.title: Our Engagement Models
sections.subtitle: Flexible models to match your stage — whether you're a solo founder with an idea or a funded startup scaling fast.

items.title: Dedicated Development Team
items.description: A full team (devs, QA, PM, designer) working exclusively on your product. Best for funded startups building a core platform.

items.title: Team Extension
items.description: Add our engineers to your existing team. They integrate with your processes, tools, and culture. Best for scaling quickly.

items.title: Project-Based Model
items.description: Fixed scope, fixed timeline, fixed price. We handle everything from design to deployment. Best for MVPs and defined projects.

sections.title: How to Launch Your {{INDUSTRY}} Platform
sections.subtitle: From first conversation to production — in as little as 10 weeks.

steps.title: Contact Us
steps.description: Fill out the form. We respond within 24 business hours.

steps.title: Free Consultation
steps.description: We discuss your requirements, target users, and build a roadmap together.

steps.title: Proposal & Estimate
steps.description: Detailed project proposal with timeline, milestones, and transparent pricing.

steps.title: Project Kickoff
steps.description: Your dedicated team starts building. Weekly demos, Slack access, full transparency.

items.q: How much does it cost to develop an {{INDUSTRY}} platform?
items.a: Costs vary based on features, integrations, and scalability. A basic MVP starts from $25K-$50K, while full-featured platforms with AI and advanced analytics range from $80K-$200K+. We provide detailed estimates after understanding your requirements.

items.q: How long does {{INDUSTRY}} software development take?
items.a: Typical development takes 10-20 weeks depending on complexity. An MVP can be ready in 8-12 weeks. Full-featured platforms with custom integrations take 16-24 weeks. We use agile sprints with weekly demos.

items.q: Can you integrate with our existing {{INDUSTRY}} systems?
items.a: Yes. We integrate with industry-standard APIs, ERP systems, payment gateways, video APIs, and custom legacy systems.

items.q: Do you build for both web and mobile?
items.a: Yes. We build responsive web apps and native/cross-platform mobile apps (iOS & Android) using React Native, Flutter, Swift, and Kotlin. Most clients start with web and add mobile in Phase 2.
Yes. We build all {{INDUSTRY}} platforms with {{COMPLIANCE_STANDARDS}} compliance from day one. Data encryption, secure APIs, and role-based access are standard.

items.q: Can the platform scale as our user base grows?
items.a: Absolutely. We use cloud-native infrastructure (AWS, Azure, GCP), microservices, auto-scaling, and CDN distribution. Our platforms serve 500K+ users and scale seamlessly.

sections.title: Ready to Build Your {{INDUSTRY}} Platform?
sections.description: You're one conversation away from turning your {{INDUSTRY}} idea into a scalable platform. Tell us what you're building — we'll show you how we can help.

form.title: Get Your Free {{INDUSTRY}} Consultation
form.layout: side-by-side name+email, stacked message (CRO pattern — no phone field)

fields.name: message
fields.label: Tell us about your {{INDUSTRY}} project
fields.placeholder: E.g., We're building an AI-powered {{INDUSTRY}} platform. We need an MVP in 3 months...

form.submitNote: No spam. No sales pitch. Just a genuine conversation about your project.

brand.name: Brilworks
brand.description: We build digital products that scale. 120+ products shipped across 20 countries. Trusted by startups, SMBs, and enterprises.

_croNotes.fix1: Hero uses outcome-driven H1 + SEO-keyword H2 (both semantic and scannable).
_croNotes.fix2: Contact form has side-by-side name+email, NO phone field (reduces friction).
_croNotes.fix3: Submit button is benefit-oriented: 'Get My Free {{INDUSTRY}} Consultation' — not generic 'Submit'.
_croNotes.fix4: Testimonials section placed BEFORE engagement models to build trust first.
_croNotes.fix5: Hero stats are industry-specific (e.g. '500K+ Learners Served' not generic 'Users').
_croNotes.fix6: Compliance badges appear NEAR the form, not in a footer section.
_croNotes.fix7: Mid-page CTA breaks long scrolls and catches users mid-read.
_croNotes.fix8: Sticky mobile CTA always-visible anchor to the contact form on mobile only.
